engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells defined expertise — installing/monitoring electronic security & domotics for homes and industry (banks, retail, clinics, schools). The 'thinking of switching providers?' pitch frames the decision as trusting this firm as your security provider, not buying a single product.

goal.one_action: contact the company to get a security solution / free month, or subscribe to the newsletter

structure.archetype_note: WordPress/Elementor/WooCommerce security firm; home is a solution-pitch splash, deeper pages are segment (home/industry) + product catalog + client login. Primary lead CTAs hand off to external Google Forms; one Linktree CTA for business benefits.

mapped.observed_as: Seguridad Industria, Bancos, Retail y Comercio
¿Quieres respaldar algunas cámaras en otro sitio?

proposed_new.name: external-lead-form
proposed_new.evidence: Primary contact/quote CTAs ('Contáctenos', 'Consigue tu Mes Gratis') route to off-site Google Forms rather than an on-page inquiry form; only the newsletter capture is on-site.

design_style.none_fits_because: No design hints captured (no fonts, colors, or dark/light); cannot assign a style with confidence.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full but only the home page was crawled; catalog (Equipos y Productos), segment, and client-access pages were not visited, and primary CTAs point to external tools whose form fields are unknown.

gap_findings: Primary lead conversion is delegated off-site to Google Forms (contact + free-month) — the closed vocab's on-page 'lead-form' cannot express an external lead handoff; sibling of external-list-signup but for lead inquiry not email list.
WooCommerce catalog coexists with a lead/contact-driven site: mixed transactional (catalog) + inquiry (forms) intent under one roof, hard to pin to a single engine.
